title: Handbook & More
excerpt: Along with the excitement about a Camp Barney summer comes the logistics. How will my children get to camp? What should they pack? Can I communicate with them during the summer? What if they need to take medicine while at camp? Rest assured that we have thought through all these details and more to ensure […]
contentHtml:
Along with the excitement about a Camp Barney summer comes the logistics. How will my children get to camp? What should they pack? Can I communicate with them during the summer? What if they need to take medicine while at camp?

Rest assured that we have thought through all these details and more to ensure every camper has a safe and fun summer, and every parent has the information they need to get their children camp ready and enjoy the time their children are at CBM.

We highly recommend you read through our Parent Handbook. It has answers to the questions above plus the questions you haven’t even thought about asking!

SIT Applicants: You will need to submit this SIT Questionnaire and send this Reference Form to your reference for submittal.

Ready to start packing? Click here for our list of what to bring to camp.

For all forms and trip waivers, please log into your CBM account.

For information on clothing labels, visit Label Daddy. You will receive a 15% CBM Discount and 10% of every purchase will go to the CBM Camp Scholarship Fund. Click here for details.

To send packages to your camper, please visit Sealed With a Kiss.

If you would like to buy a brick, click here and choose Brick Campaign in the dropdown list.

If you can’t find the answers, click here to email us and we are happy to help!
